metadata.customInstructions:
Brand direction: warm-utility hybrid for the open-design-mcp documentation site. Reference: Astro/Bun/Deno/Resend docs — friendly canvas, code as hero, single warm-teal accent.

PALETTE (OKLch — bind verbatim to :root):
--bg: oklch(98% 0.005 160)        /* warm-near-white */
--surface: oklch(100% 0 0)
--surface-2: oklch(96% 0.008 170) /* hover/grouped sections */
--fg: oklch(20% 0.02 200)
--muted: oklch(50% 0.015 200)
--subtle: oklch(68% 0.012 200)
--border: oklch(90% 0.008 180)
--border-strong: oklch(82% 0.012 180)
--accent: oklch(56% 0.13 175)     /* warm teal */
--accent-fg: oklch(98% 0.005 175)
--accent-tint: oklch(94% 0.025 175)
--success: oklch(58% 0.16 145)
--code-bg: oklch(96% 0.008 180)
--code-fg: oklch(28% 0.02 200)

TYPOGRAPHY:
--font-display: 'Söhne', 'Inter', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif
--font-body: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, sans-serif
--font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace
Display weight 700, letter-spacing -0.02em, clamp(28px, 4vw, 56px).
Body 16-17px, regular weight.
Mono everywhere for code, tool names (od_*), versions (v0.15.2), commit hashes, file paths, env vars.
Tabular numerics on numbers and versions.

POSTURE (5 commandments — non-negotiable):
1. Code is hero content. Code blocks are first-class visual elements, not snippets to tuck away.
2. ONE accent used at most TWICE per page. Warm teal on primary CTA + at most one supporting accent. Never flood every section with teal.
3. Hairline 1px borders only. NO drop shadows except on dialogs/modals.
4. Cards 12px radius, code blocks + pills 0-4px radius. Two distinct shapes by purpose.
5. Whitespace > illustration. NO hand-drawn humans, abstract gradients, robot mascots, emoji icons.

COMPONENT GRAMMAR:
- Primary button: bg accent, accent-fg text, 8px radius, font-display 600
- Secondary button: transparent, border-strong, fg text, 8px radius
- Inline code: code-bg, code-fg, 4px radius, mono 0.9em, 2px-6px padding
- Code block: code-bg, hairline border, 8px radius, mono 14px, line-height 1.6, 20px-24px padding
- Pill (version/status): accent-tint bg, accent text, 999px radius, mono 12px 600, 2px-8px padding
- Tool name in tables: mono 500 weight, no background
- Section header: font-display, clamp(28px,4vw,44px), 700, letter-spacing -0.02em

LAYOUT:
- Max content width 1120px, centered
- Section padding clamp(64px, 10vh, 120px) top/bottom
- Sticky nav: backdrop-filter blur(12px) saturate(180%), bg oklch(98% 0.005 160 / 0.8)
- Grid 12-col desktop, single-col mobile, 32-48px gap

HARD NO (anti-AI-slop):
- NO purple/violet gradients
- NO peach/beige/cream/pink/orange washes
- NO generic emoji icons (✨🚀🎯 etc.)
- NO invented metrics ("10× faster", "trusted by 1000+ teams", fake stars/downloads)
- NO lorem ipsum or "Feature One/Two/Three" filler
- NO hand-drawn humans/faces/scenery SVGs
- NO Inter/Roboto for DISPLAY (body is fine)
- NO drop shadows on cards
- NO three competing flourishes — pick ONE and amplify

REAL DATA ONLY (verify before emitting):
- Tool names: only the real 10 from src/tools/ (od_list_projects, od_get_project, od_create_project, od_update_project, od_delete_project, od_save_artifact, od_save_project_file, od_lint_artifact, od_compose_brief, od_generate_design)
- Versions: only real released versions (v0.15.2 current latest, v0.14.0 first 10-tool release)
- PR/issue numbers: only real (#54 added save_project_file, #55 docs refresh, #52 doc-drift cleanup, #51 maxTokens fix, #50 customInstructions stash, #42 compose-brief, #41 od-workflow skill, etc.)
- Author: kokorolx
- License: Apache-2.0
- Repo: nano-step/open-design-mcp
- npm: open-design-mcp@0.15.2
- Description: stdio MCP server bridging coding agents (OpenCode/Claude Code/Cursor/Zed) to a running Open Design daemon via 10 tools.

When a stat or number is missing, use "—" or a labelled placeholder. Honest placeholder beats fake stat.
